sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports pain with any movement on their left shoulder. He reports pain in the left hand. The patient experiences pain. The patient reports pain. The patient reports pain.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is mildly low. Heart rate is within normal limits. Neurologic examination is nonfocal.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient is restricted from carrying heavy weights. Symptoms are most consistent with musculoskeletal pain.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor recommends using an ice pack to relieve pain. The doctor recommends using a heat pad to relieve pain. The patient should use their right hand instead. The doctor recommends continuing the use of ibuprofen at 600 mg three times a day for a week. The patient should come back to see the doctor if the pain is still there. The doctor recommends a follow-up in one week.
medical_concepts: ibuprofen 600 mg three times a day
